ReceivedEmail.title: Received Email Message
ReceivedEmail.description: A backup record of a temporary email received by a burner address, stored for durable accessibility.

id.description: The unique message ID assigned by the router.

body.description: The main content of the message.

htmlBody.description: HTML formatting of the message body.

textBody.description: Plain-text formatting of the message body.

recipient.description: The temporary burner address that received this message.

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp representing the arrival time.

/received_emails/{emailId}.description: Durable collection of incoming verification emails synced to secure cloud storage.
